verses.text: A promise of rest remains; 'let us therefore fear, lest... any of you should seem to come short.' The word profits only when 'mixed with faith.' Believe and enter. Faith lays hold of the promised rest.

A promise of rest remains; 'let us therefore fear, lest... any of you should seem to come short.' The word profits only when 'mixed with faith.' Believe and enter. Faith lays hold of the promised rest.

A promise of rest remains; 'let us therefore fear, lest... any of you should seem to come short.' The word profits only when 'mixed with faith.' Believe and enter. Faith lays hold of the promised rest.
God rested the seventh day; yet He again limits a day, 'To day,' showing the rest was not fully entered. Still open. The true rest still calls for our response.

God rested the seventh day; yet He again limits a day, 'To day,' showing the rest was not fully entered. Still open. The true rest still calls for our response.
If Joshua had given them rest, God would not speak of another day; 'there remaineth therefore a rest to the people of God.' Sabbath rest. A deeper rest awaits the faithful in Christ.
If Joshua had given them rest, God would not speak of another day; 'there remaineth therefore a rest to the people of God.' Sabbath rest. A deeper rest awaits the faithful in Christ.
If Joshua had given them rest, God would not speak of another day; 'there remaineth therefore a rest to the people of God.' Sabbath rest. A deeper rest awaits the faithful in Christ.
Labour to enter that rest; 'the word of God is quick, and powerful,' a discerner of the heart, before whom all is naked. Searching word. Scripture lays the heart bare before God.

Labour to enter that rest; 'the word of God is quick, and powerful,' a discerner of the heart, before whom all is naked. Searching word. Scripture lays the heart bare before God.
We have a great high priest, Jesus, touched with our infirmities; 'let us therefore come boldly unto the throne of grace.' Bold approach. Our sympathising Priest opens the throne to us.
